patch.value:
## Agent need
Project management = context management: an agent must retrieve existing context before acting, both to reuse knowledge and to avoid creating duplicate items.

## Delivered surface (pm-ydp6)
BM25 + corpus; vector-stores + embedding-batches; hybrid relevance; inline-field query parser + --highlight; background-refresh + staleness; pm eval golden-query harness.

## Verified by
search-bm25 tests and the golden-queries eval fixtures. Enduring agent-value statement for the search capability; new work lands in pm-ydp6.
As a coding agent, I want keyword, semantic, and hybrid search with inline field filters, so that I can find relevant prior context before creating new work and never duplicate an item

BM25 offline provider plus optional vector/hybrid retrieval; inline field:value query syntax; --status/--type/--tag scoping composes; relevance regressions are caught by a golden-query eval gate (nDCG/MRR).
Delivered and maintained by pm-ydp6: BM25 + vector/hybrid search, inline field filters, background reindex, and a golden-query eval harness.
An agent finds relevant context before creating work, preventing duplicates.
BM25 offline + vector/hybrid + inline field search + eval harness shipped.
Delivered and maintained by pm-ydp6: BM25 + vector/hybrid search, inline field filters, background reindex, and a golden-query eval harness.
